text:
School of Computer Science Engineering and Information Systems
Winter Semester 2025-2026
Development of projects through students as part of the courses
in place of assignment & quiz.
Programme Name & Branch: MCA Slot :D1+D2
PAMCA506- FULL STACK WEB DEVELOPMENT
PROJECT DEVELOPMENT
 Students are advised to use below tools only for application development:
o Either React JS/Angular JS with HTML, CSS capabilities for Front End
Design
o Node JS for Server Side Back End Scripting
o Database can be of your choice. Suggested to use Mongo DB
 Use any IDE of your choice
 Project should contain creative user interface design, main dashboard and all the
navigations should be initiated from the menus available in the dashboard interface.
 Ensure data displayed in the interface are extracted from the database. Static data
display is not encouraged.
PRELIMINARY REVIEW: before 13/03/2026
FINAL REVIEW: on or before 16/04/2025
